蟒.origin: 蟒 has the insect 虫 to show it is a huge snake, a python.

蟹.origin: 蟹 has the insect 虫 below and means crab.

蠹.origin: 蠹 shows insects 虫 eating wood, a moth or bookworm.

sentence.en: There is a bookworm in the book.

衔.origin: 衔 means to hold in the mouth, and also a rank or title.

sentence.en: He has a very high title.

表.origin: 表 once meant outer fur clothing; now it means surface or to express, and also a watch.

衫.origin: 衫 has the clothing radical 衤 and means a shirt or thin robe.

sentence.en: He is wearing a white shirt.

衬.origin: 衬 has the clothing radical 衤 and means to line or an undershirt.

袁.origin: 袁 pictures a person wearing a long robe; today it is mostly a family name.

袄.origin: 袄 has the clothing radical 衤 and means a padded coat or jacket.

sentence.en: In winter you wear a padded coat.

袋.origin: 袋 has clothing 衣 at the bottom and means a bag or sack.

袖.origin: 袖 has the clothing radical 衤 and means a sleeve.

袭.origin: 袭 means to attack or to raid by surprise.

袱.origin: 袱 has the cloth radical 衤 and means a cloth wrapper for carrying things.

sentence.en: She is carrying a cloth bundle.

裁.origin: 裁 means to cut cloth 衣 with a blade 戈, so to trim or tailor.

裂.origin: 裂 has clothing 衣 and means to split or tear apart.

裆.origin: 裆 has the cloth radical 衤 and means the crotch of pants.

sentence.en: The crotch of his pants is torn.

裤.origin: 裤 has the cloth radical 衤 and means pants or trousers.

sentence.en: I bought a pair of pants.

裱.origin: 裱 means to mount or hang a picture, using cloth 衤.

裸.origin: 裸 has the cloth radical 衤 but means bare, with no clothes.

sentence.en: He stands outside with bare feet.

裹.origin: 裹 has clothing 衣 around 果 and means to wrap up.

褐.origin: 褐 has the cloth radical 衤 and means coarse cloth, also the color brown.

褪.origin: 褪 means to take off clothing 衤 or for color to fade.

襟.origin: 襟 has the cloth radical 衤 and means the front of a coat, the lapel.

sentence.en: The front of his coat got wet.

覃.origin: 覃 means to reach or spread far; today it is also a family name.

覆.origin: 覆 means to cover over or to turn upside down.

观.origin: 观 means to look at or watch, using the eye 见.

sentence.en: We are going to watch the game.

规.origin: 规 means rules and also a compass for drawing circles.

觅.origin: 觅 shows a hand 爫 and an eye 见 searching, so to seek.

sentence.en: The little bird is looking for food.

视.origin: 视 has the eye 见 and means to look or to view.

触.origin: 触 has horn 角 and means to touch or bump into.

詹.origin: 詹 has speech 言 and once meant talkative; today it is a family name.

誊.origin: 誊 has speech 言 and means to copy out neatly.

sentence.en: Please copy out the essay once.

誓.origin: 誓 has words 言 and means a vow that must not be broken.

警.origin: 警 has speech 言 and means to warn or to guard.

订.origin: 订 has the speech radical 讠 and means to order or to fix an agreement.

sentence.en: I want to order a book.

认.origin: 认 has the speech radical 讠 and means to recognize or to admit.

讨.origin: 讨 has the speech radical 讠 and means to discuss or to ask for.

训.origin: 训 has the speech radical 讠 and means to teach or to instruct.

议.origin: 议 has the speech radical 讠 and means to discuss or to talk over.

讯.origin: 讯 has the speech radical 讠 and means news or information.

讳.origin: 讳 has the speech radical 讠 and means a word one avoids saying, a taboo.

许.origin: 许 has the speech radical 讠 and means to allow or to permit.

sentence.en: Mom allows me to go out and play.

讹.origin: 讹 has the speech radical 讠 and means to cheat or an error.

sentence.en: The bad guy wants to extort money.

论.origin: 论 has the speech radical 讠 and means to discuss or to reason.

访.origin: 访 has the speech radical 讠 and means to visit or to call on.

sentence.en: We are going to visit a friend.

识.origin: 识 has the speech radical 讠 and means to know or knowledge.

诈.origin: 诈 has the speech radical 讠 and means to cheat or to defraud.

诉.origin: 诉 has the speech radical 讠 and means to tell or to accuse.

诌.origin: 诌 has the speech radical 讠 and means to make up or babble words.

词.origin: 词 has the speech radical 讠 and means a word or term.
